_comment: CreatorOS Claude Code project settings. Auto Mode on. Tool allowlist tuned for the action plan in docs/04-plans/v1-action-plan.md.

autoMode._note: Two-stage classifier auto-approves read-only and trivially safe operations. Subagents spawned by Dynamic Workflows run in acceptEdits mode when this is on.

effort._note: Override per-session with /effort. Max plan defaults Dynamic Workflows on at ultracode.

autoInvoke._note: architect-reviewer auto-runs on staged diff before any commit suggestion. The diff must pass before the protocol skill allows commit.

skills._note: Other skills (loop-stage-creation, agent-persona-creation) load on-demand based on their YAML frontmatter description matching.

context._note: When CLAUDE.md uses @docs/... imports, Claude Code follows them automatically. This is how the routing table works.
